name: Donga Door(Inswing)
subtitle: Cyclone rated inswing steel door for transportable and modular buildings.
shortDescription: Australian engineered pre-hung steel door designed for transportable buildings, container modifications, steel frame sheds and modular construction. Built to withstand cyclone conditions while delivering reliable weatherproof performance.
longDescription: The Motisan Donga Door (Inswing) is engineered and manufactured to meet Australian standards and requirements. Featuring a pre-hung dual frame system, galvanised steel construction, UV-resistant powder coating and fire-resistant rockwool insulation, this door is designed for transportable buildings, container modifications, steel frame sheds and block wall applications. The custom-made bottom frame incorporates three drainage slots to improve water management while maintaining a tight weather seal. Certified to AS/NZS 1170.2:2021 Cyclonic Region C requirements, it provides dependable performance in Australia's harshest environments.

features.explain: Supplied pre-hung with a dual frame system for fast installation across transportable buildings, steel frame structures and modular projects.
Designed and certified to AS/NZS 1170.2:2021 requirements for Cyclonic Region C and suitable for demanding Australian conditions.
A durable four-sided frame with gasket sealing helps prevent water ingress and improves weatherproof performance.
Custom-made bottom frame with three slot holes provides effective water drainage while maintaining a secure weather seal.
Manufactured using galvanised steel door leaf and frame for excellent durability, corrosion resistance and long-term reliability.
Fire-resistant rockwool insulation improves thermal performance while contributing to occupant safety.

specifications.Powder Coating: Available in various colours or dual-colour finishes

whyChoose: The Motisan Donga Door (Inswing) combines cyclone-rated strength, weatherproof protection and installation efficiency in a single solution. Engineered for Australian conditions and certified for Cyclonic Region C, it is an ideal choice for transportable buildings, modular structures and steel frame construction projects requiring dependable long-term performance.

seo.title: Donga Door Inswing | Cyclone Rated Steel Door for Transportable Buildings
seo.description: Australian engineered inswing steel door certified for Cyclonic Region C. Ideal for transportable buildings, modular construction, steel frame sheds and container modifications.
